notes_extracted.policy: Initial franchise fees are deferred and recognized over the expected customer life (typically the initial FA term). Sales-based royalty fees recognized over time as services rendered. System-wide services accounted for under a fund model — revenues deferred and expenses recognized as incurred, managed to break-even over time.

Points earned represent material right to future goods/services. Assessment fees billed monthly, revenues deferred until member redeems points. Upon redemption at managed/franchised properties, deferred revenue recognized in revenues for reimbursed costs. Breakage estimated actuarially.

notes_extracted.detail: $1,333 million as of 12/31/2024. Actuarially determined based on anticipated timing of future point redemptions including breakage estimate. Critical audit matter per Deloitte.

notes_extracted.policy: D&A expense: $333M (2024), $397M (2023), $426M (2022). Declining trend consistent with asset-light strategy and dispositions.

Quarterly assessment for equity investments; annual assessment for goodwill (Q4). Property and equipment assessed when indicators exist. Fair value estimated via discounted cash flows (Level Three), third-party appraisals, or pending offers.
notes_extracted.detail: FY2024: $213M total impairments — $148M goodwill (management/franchising and distribution segments), $21M property and equipment, $15M goodwill on hotel sales, $29M other.

Net goodwill: $2,541M (12/31/2024) vs $3,205M (12/31/2023). Decrease driven by $914M disposal (distribution), $163M impairments, partially offset by $422M additions. Management and franchising segment goodwill: $1,495M net.
Provision: $267M (2024), $90M (2023), benefit of $92M (2022). Deferred tax assets: $466M (2024). The 2022 benefit likely driven by the ALG Vacations transaction timing.
Operating lease ROU assets: $328M (2024) vs $369M (2023). Current operating lease liabilities: $33M. Long-term operating lease liabilities: $245M. Amortization of ROU assets: $36M (2024).
Current maturities: $456M. Long-term: $3,326M. Total: $3,782M. FY2024 activity: $1,424M proceeds (net of $14M offering costs), $750M repayments.

Net receivables: $1,121M (2024). Allowance: $62M. Financing receivables: $445M gross ($368M long-term net), including $150M secured and $295M unsecured loans to hotel owners. Unsecured allowance: $36M.

System-wide services managed under fund model. Revenues and expenses expected to break even over time but may not align in any given period. Reimbursed costs revenue: $3,352M (2024). Reimbursed costs expense: $3,457M. The $105M excess of costs over revenues reflects timing differences.
FY2024: Realigned to management and franchising, owned and leased, distribution, and overhead segments. Franchise and other fee revenues: $458M (2024), up from $364M (2023).
$1,190M in FY2024 ($1,198M including excise tax). Class A: 4,362,776 shares. Class B: 3,629,480 shares. Aggressive capital return program.
$0.15 per share declared. Total: $61M (2024), $48M (2023). Dividend initiated in 2023.

notes_extracted.note: Gains on Sales of Real Estate
notes_extracted.detail: $1,245M (2024) vs $18M (2023) vs $263M (2022). Major dispositions in 2024 consistent with asset-light strategy.
At 12/31/2024, $335M goodwill from Bahia Principe Transaction not yet allocated to reporting units. $277M noncontrolling interest acquired.
May be obligated to fund up to $142M related to certain guarantees from UVC Transaction. $67M guarantee liabilities recorded at 12/31/2024.
